title: Yuki's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Yuki feels worried about bedtime until she discovers the magic of counting sleepy stars that help her feel calm and ready for sweet dreams.

pages.text: Yuki sits on her bed with her favorite bunny. She feels worried because bedtime feels big and scary tonight.

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes sitting on a bed holding a soft bunny. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds, gentle moonlight streaming through a window, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: Yuki sitting on her bed with a bunny, moonlight coming through window

pages.text: Mama comes and sits beside Yuki. 'What's making you feel worried, little star?' she asks with a gentle voice.

illustration.description: A mother sitting next to a little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes on a bed. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars beginning to appear, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: Mama sitting with Yuki on the bed talking gently

pages.text: 'The dark feels too big,' Yuki whispers. 'And I don't know if I can sleep all by myself tonight.'

illustration.description: Close-up of a little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes looking worried while hugging her bunny. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, gentle shadows, round sleepy faces, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: Yuki looking worried while hugging her bunny close

pages.text: Mama points to the window where tiny stars are starting to twinkle. 'Look, Yuki. The sleepy stars are coming to help you.'

illustration.description: A mother and little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes looking out a window at twinkling stars. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces on the stars, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: Mama and Yuki looking at stars through the window

pages.text: 'Let's count the sleepy stars together,' Mama says. 'One sleepy star says goodnight to all the bunnies.'

illustration.description: A glowing star with a sleepy face floating above a little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes and her mother. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: One glowing sleepy star floating above Yuki and Mama

pages.text: 'Two sleepy stars sing a quiet lullaby.' Yuki starts to feel calmer as she watches the gentle stars dance.

illustration.description: Two glowing stars with round sleepy faces floating and dancing above a little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes who looks more relaxed. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, musical notes floating in air, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: Two sleepy stars dancing while Yuki watches, looking calmer

pages.text: 'Three sleepy stars sprinkle dream dust to make everything cozy and safe.' Yuki yawns and snuggles deeper into her blankets.

illustration.description: Three glowing stars with round sleepy faces sprinkling sparkly dust over a little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes who is yawning in bed. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, sparkling dream dust, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: Three stars sprinkling dream dust while Yuki yawns in bed

pages.text: Now Yuki feels sleepy and peaceful. 'Thank you, sleepy stars,' she whispers. 'I'm ready for sweet dreams now.' She closes her eyes with a smile.

illustration.description: A peaceful little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes sleeping with a gentle smile, surrounded by many glowing stars with round sleepy faces. Soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette.
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully with a smile, surrounded by glowing sleepy stars

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How does Yuki feel at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Yuki feels worried because bedtime feels big and scary to her.

questions.question: What does Mama show Yuki to help her feel better?
questions.explanation: Mama shows Yuki the sleepy stars twinkling outside her window.

questions.question: How many sleepy stars do Yuki and Mama count?
questions.explanation: They count three sleepy stars that each do something special to help Yuki feel ready for sleep.

questions.question: How does Yuki feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Yuki feels peaceful and sleepy, ready for sweet dreams.
